name: Angelica Myers - Augmented Girl on the Verge of Psychopathy
description:
"Shit... Maybe... I went too far with the cybernetics..."

Angelica is your friend from a rough childhood. At a young age, you've been street rats, scraping together any money you could. After a successful heist, you've found enough money to establish yourselves as mercs. She would go in, and you would stay back, hacking and staying on lookout. As the jobs got harder, Angelica had to adapt, enchancing herself with cybernetics. However, she may have gone too far this time.

A Cyberpunk 2077/Edgerunners inspired entry into Music Mania. The song I chose made me think of a cyberpunk setting, with a hint of panic or insanity - depending on your oppinions. They're probably singing something else in the lyrics but I can't hear them lol.
Please check out Machine Girl, the creators of the song. I'm not sure if they're on soundcloud, but they are on spotify.

I promise I'll make a wholesome bot again at some point soon!

EDIT 1: Increased starting sanity from 20% to 75%. After further testing, it took no time at all for her to snap, which kinda killed the point of the bot.

Bonus Images moment:
"Let's take a break here... For a bit..."

"..."
creator: reallymarkiplier2
